subject: Cycle 5a intent 92f9c332 will hit same commitlint failure: subject is 103 chars (limit 100); pre-flight DM before marshal cycle starts
body: Mistbound pre-flight check on intent 92f9c332 before marshal-cycle. Holding marshal-cycle until you abandon 92f9c332 and re-enqueue with shorter subject. Files in working tree unchanged. Wind-down direction from Lunar (Director) names Cycle 5 (re-enqueue) as the gating commit for owner-pause; please pick a sub-100-char subject and re-enqueue.
